---
name: feature
about: Report a feature on Mirador
title: '[$name] '
labels: ['feature']
---

<!-- Before proposing a feature: read docs/adr/0021-cost-deferred-industrial-patterns.md.
     Mirador accepts features that advance a demo scenario; it declines features that add
     dependencies without a problem they solve. -->

## Problem

<!-- What concrete problem does this address? Who hits it, when? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What would you add or change? Rough scope, not full design. -->

## Alternatives

<!-- What else did you consider? Why did this option win? -->

## Demo scenario impact

<!-- Does this improve an existing demo scenario (dashboard health, chaos, resilience,
     pipeline monitor, …)? Or does it introduce a new one worth exercising? -->

## ADR-worthy?

- [ ] Yes — a new architectural pattern / tool / library
- [ ] No — internal refactor, code-style, bug fix

If yes, a draft ADR would come with the MR. See the ADR criteria in
[`docs/adr/README.md`](../../docs/adr/README.md).
